THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANSANELLI, CHELSEA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAN, WING $600.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $650.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT CHAN, WING MAILED TO RESPONDENT ANSANELLI, CHELSEA
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-07-2016 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF APR-07-2016 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED IN PART. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF FEBRUARY 26, 2016 IS REVISED AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT IN THE AMOUNT OF 612.00, COSTS OF $50.00, $300.00 (CC1950.5(L), FOR A TOTAL AWARD OF $962.00.00. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO C.C.P. SEC. 1952.

ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT(SC-108A)- DENIED
ORDER RE: ORDER OF EXAMINATION; STATUS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. NO APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR CHELSEA ANSANELLI. NO APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT DEBTOR WING CHAN. PER THE FEBRUARY 6, 2017 ORDER THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR PAID THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR THE FULL AMOUNT DUE BY CHECK $1042.37. IF NEITHER PARTY APPEARS THE MATTER WILL BE DICHARGED AS SETTLED AND THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR WILL FILE A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF FEB-06-2017 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-16-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR INFORMS THE COURT THAT THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR GAVE HER A CHECK FOR $1042.37 THE FULL AMOUNT DUE TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS CONTINUED IN ORDER FOR THE CHECK TO CLEAR. IF THE CHECK CLEARS THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR WILL NOT APPEAR AT THE NEXT CALENDARED HEARING DATE AND WILL FILE A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. JUDGMENT CREDITOR CHELSEA ANSANELLI IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR WING CHAN IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Mar-16-2017 Discharged

SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Feb-06-2017 Continued To Mar-16-17 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 506

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-07-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Thursday, April 7, 2016 in Department 525:
Chelsea Ansanelli, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona.
Wing Chan, Appellant/Defendant appears as Propria Persona with Mandarin Interpreter/witness Yuankai Lin.
The clerk administers the interpreter's oath to Yuankai Lin to translate the English language into the Mandarin language and vice versa.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witness are sworn.
Respondent/Plaintiff, Chelsea Ansanelli testifies on her own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (A) - Group exhibits - e-mails and rental application; (pleading documents are returned to Ms. Ansanelli)

Yuankai Lin testifies on behalf of Wing Chan and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (1) - group exhibits -written testimony, rental agreement, 3 pages of text messages, 3 pages e-mails, pest control invoice.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly marked evidence is retained.

Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles. Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-26-2016 Judgment Entered
